config.voxyworldgen.title: Voxy World Gen Configuration
config.voxyworldgen.category.settings.to: All configuration options for Voxy World Gen
config.voxyworldgen.group.general.descri: Core mod settings and performance options
config.voxyworldgen.enabled.description: Master toggle for the passive chunk generation system. When disabled, no new chunks will be generated passively.
config.voxyworldgen.chunks_per_tick.desc: How many chunks to process per server tick. Higher values generate chunks faster but may impact server performance.
config.voxyworldgen.generation_style.des:
The pattern used to generate chunks around players and spawn. Different patterns affect how quickly nearby vs distant chunks are loaded.

§6Spiral Out§r: Starts at center, spirals outward (best for exploration)
§6Spiral In§r: Starts at edge, spirals inward
§6Concentric§r: Generates in square rings around center
§6Original§r: Line-based pattern (fastest, less uniform)
§6Random§r: Random order within radius
config.voxyworldgen.group.distances.desc: Configure generation distances around players and world spawn
config.voxyworldgen.player_distance.desc: The radius (in chunks) around each player where new chunks will be passively generated. This helps pre-load areas players are likely to visit.
config.voxyworldgen.spawn_distance.descr: The radius (in chunks) around the world spawn point where chunks will be passively generated. Set to 0 to disable spawn-based generation.
config.voxyworldgen.prioritize_player.de: When enabled, chunks closer to players will be generated before chunks further away. This ensures the most relevant areas are loaded first.
